name: Broccoli and Ziti Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds fresh broccoli, cooked and chopped
1 pound ziti, cooked according to package
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and sauté until softened, not browned.
3. Stir in the broccoli and cook for a few minutes.
4. Spread half of the tomato sauce on the bottom of a 9x13 inch casserole dish.
5. Layer with half of the cooked ziti, half of the Parmesan cheese mixed together, all Mozzarella (if using), and all of the broccoli.
6. Sprinkle with Ricotta cheese.
7. Add remaining ziti, sauce, bread crumbs, and wheat germ (if using).
8. Top with remaining Parmesan cheese.
9. Cover and bake at 350°F for 35 minutes. If refrigerated before cooking, add an additional 10 minutes of baking time.
10. Remove the cover and continue baking until the top is lightly browned and sauce is bubbling.
